parameters.name: Weight of moving object
parameters.description: Mass or gravitational load of an object that moves relative to the system or environment.

parameters.name: Weight of stationary object
parameters.description: Mass or load of an object fixed relative to the system or environment.

parameters.name: Length of moving object
parameters.description: Linear extent of a moving object along its primary dimension.
parameters.software_equivalent: Code path length / latency chain depth

parameters.name: Length of stationary object
parameters.description: Linear extent of a stationary object along its primary dimension.

parameters.name: Area of moving object
parameters.description: Surface extent of a moving object projected onto a reference plane.

parameters.name: Area of stationary object
parameters.description: Surface extent of a stationary object projected onto a reference plane.

parameters.name: Volume of moving object
parameters.description: Three-dimensional size occupied by a moving object.

parameters.name: Volume of stationary object
parameters.description: Three-dimensional size occupied by a stationary object.

parameters.name: Speed
parameters.description: Rate of motion, process velocity, or cycle frequency.

parameters.name: Force (Intensity)
parameters.description: Magnitude of mechanical effort, torque, or generalized applied intensity.

parameters.name: Stress or pressure
parameters.description: Internal mechanical load per unit area: pressure, tension, or stress state.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: External configuration, contour, or geometric arrangement of the object.

parameters.name: Stability of the object's composition
parameters.description: Constancy of material makeup, phase, or chemical composition over conditions and time.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.description: Resistance to breakage, deformation, or failure under load.

parameters.name: Duration of action of moving object
parameters.description: How long a moving part or mobile subsystem can act or survive before wear or failure.

parameters.name: Duration of action of stationary object
parameters.description: How long a fixed part or static subsystem can act or survive under use or environment.

parameters.name: Temperature
parameters.description: Thermal level or heat-related condition of the system or surroundings.

parameters.name: Illumination intensity
parameters.description: Level of light, brightness, or optical energy in the operating environment.

parameters.name: Use of energy by moving object
parameters.description: Energy consumed or dissipated by moving elements during active operation.

parameters.name: Use of energy by stationary object
parameters.description: Energy consumed by stationary elements when idle or in standby.

parameters.name: Power
parameters.description: Useful power delivered or processed versus time for the technical function.

parameters.name: Loss of energy
parameters.description: Energy wasted as heat, friction, or non-useful forms instead of useful work.

parameters.name: Loss of substance
parameters.description: Material mass or volume lost through wear, leakage, consumption, or erosion.

parameters.name: Loss of information
parameters.description: Degradation, corruption, or loss of data, signals, or usable information.

parameters.name: Loss of time
parameters.description: Delays, waiting, or non-value time in the process or operation.

parameters.name: Quantity of substance/the matter
parameters.description: Amount of material, matter, or inventory involved in the system.

parameters.name: Reliability
parameters.description: Probability of correct operation without failure over a defined period or mission.

parameters.name: Measurement accuracy
parameters.description: How closely measurements match true values; error of instrumentation.

parameters.name: Manufacturing precision
parameters.description: Tolerance and repeatability achieved in production or assembly.

parameters.name: Object-affected harmful factors
parameters.description: Undesired external influences that damage or disturb the object.

parameters.name: Object-generated harmful factors
parameters.description: Harmful by-products, emissions, or effects produced by the object itself.

parameters.name: Ease of manufacture
parameters.description: How easily the object can be produced, assembled, or implemented.

parameters.name: Ease of operation
parameters.description: How easily users can operate, control, or interact with the system.

parameters.name: Ease of repair
parameters.description: How easily the system can be diagnosed, serviced, or restored after faults.

parameters.name: Adaptability or versatility
parameters.description: Ability to serve multiple functions, contexts, or requirement changes.

parameters.name: Device complexity
parameters.description: Number of parts, interfaces, and interdependencies in the technical system.

parameters.name: Difficulty of detecting and measuring
parameters.description: Effort and instrumentation needed to observe, sense, or verify system state.

parameters.name: Extent of automation
parameters.description: Degree to which functions run without human intervention.

parameters.name: Productivity
parameters.description: Useful output per unit time, resource, or cost for the system.
